name: huint
description: Connect Codex to Huint's hosted MCP for exact-location photo task operations.

interface.shortDescription: Create and review exact-location photo tasks.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Huint's hosted MCP server with Supabase OAuth. Verify the live connection, resolve real places, create exact-GPS photo tasks, inspect operator-scoped work, and review tasker photo submissions with prompt-gated mutation tools.
defaultPrompt: Resolve this address for a Huint photo task.
List pending Huint submissions for review.
